attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
 1 as BATCH_ID,
OBJECT_ID as OBJECT_ID,
OPTY_ID as OPTY_ID,
OPTY_ID as OPTY_NUMBER,
OPTY_NAME as OPTY_NAME,
CAST(CREATED_ON AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as CREATED_ON,
CREATED_BY as CREATED_BY,
CAST(UPDATED_ON AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as UPDATED_ON,
UPDATED_BY as UPDATED_BY,
cast(CAST(substr(APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,1,instr(APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,'.',1)-1) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as TIMESTAMP(0) format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,
CAST(DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE,
case REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG when 'T' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' end AS REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,
PROD_SALES_PATH as PROD_SALES_PATH,
SERV_SALES_PATH as SERV_SALES_PATH,
cast('1900-01-01 00:00:00'  as timestamp(0)) as FIRST_INSTALLATION_DT,
MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE as MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE,
VERTICAL_MARKET as VERTICAL_MARKET,
MDM_PROD_VALUE as MDM_PROD_VALUE,
MDM_SERV_VALUE as MDM_SERV_VALUE,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(DM_UPDATE_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as DM_UPDATE_DATE,
QF_FORM_ID as QF_FORM_ID,
REOPEN_REASON as REOPEN_REASON,
QF_FORM_STATUS as QF_FORM_STATUS,
DDA_DEAL_DURATION as DDA_DEAL_DURATION,
CAST(LAST_APPROVAL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as LAST_APPROVAL_DATE,
DEAL_DURATION as DEAL_DURATION,
DEAL_TYPE as DEAL_TYPE,
DEAL_TYPE_NAME as DEAL_TYPE_NAME,
DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE as DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE,
DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME as DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
cast(CAST(substr(EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,1,instr(EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,'.',1)-1) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as TIMESTAMP(0) format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,
ACTIVE_WORKFLOW as ACTIVE_WORKFLOW,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS as MDM_DEAL_STATUS,
CAST(MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE,
PDR_PROD_VALUE as PDR_PROD_VfALUE,
PDR_SERV_VALUE as PDR_SERV_VALUE,
SFDC_OPTY_ID as SFDC_OPTY_ID,
QUOTE_FLAG as QUOTE_FLAG,
DEAL_OR_QUOTE as DEAL_OR_QUOTE,
PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE as PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE,
SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG as SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG,
PARENT_OBJECT_ID as PARENT_OBJECT_ID,
DEAL_SCOPE as DEAL_SCOPE,
DEAL_SCOPE_NAME as DEAL_SCOPE_NAME,
MERGED_SFDC_OPTY_ID as MERGED_SFDC_OPTY_ID,
OPTY_STATUS as OPTY_STATUS,
CREATOR_PAE_USER_ID as CREATOR_PAE_USER_ID,
CDP_FLAG as CDP_FLAG,
'' as  LEGACY_FLAG,
RFP_FLAG as RFP_FLAG,
MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_DESC as  MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_DESC,
BUSINESS_SCENARIO as BUSINESS_SCENARIO,
PUBLISH_DISCOUNT_FLAG as PUBLISH_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
DEAL_SOURCE as DEAL_SOURCE,
DEAL_SOURCE_NAME as DEAL_SOURCE_NAME,
CUSTOMER_USE_CASE as CUSTOMER_USE_CASE,
CUSTOMER_USE_SOLUTION as CUSTOMER_USE_SOLUTION,
CASE SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG when 'True' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' end AS SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME as MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME,
'' as  PROGRAM_NAME,
DEAL_OBJECT_ID as  DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(SUBMIT_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as SUBMIT_DATE,
FINAL_BAND  as  FINAL_BAND,
FINANCIAL_SUMMARY as FINANCIAL_SUMMARY,
SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER as SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER,
CREATE_DATETIME as  CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' as  ACTION_CODE,
UPDATED_BY_KAFKA as UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
cast(left (UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
'' as DEAL_TYPE_DESC,
PARTITION_NUMBER as PARTITION_NUMBER,
MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER as MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
AUTO_CS_QUOTE as AUTO_CS_QUOTE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL_KAFKA_FF SICQV
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL_KAFKA ELCQV
where SICQV.OPTY_ID=ELCQV.OPTY_ID
and SICQV.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER=ELCQV.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER)
